source.method: concept views from formula dependencies, formula-symbol maps, and structured evidence

views.name: Three Ways
views.definition: Three Ways is the main quantity to read from this equation; the right-hand side shows which terms determine it.
views.definition_zh: Three Ways 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。
views.formula_section: The Genetic Effective Size of a Population: Introduction

introduced_concepts.name: Inbreeding Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: Using this definition of, many of the results in the previous chapter can be generalized, at least to a first-order approximation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Inbreeding Coefficient 是调节关系强弱或方向的参数，用来判断右侧条件如何影响目标量。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 3.1 Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

views.name: Formula 3.9 Relationship
views.definition: Thus, the total probability that O inherits two genes from the same grandparent is (3.9)
views.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。

views.name: Formula 3.13 Relationship
views.definition: Nown as the generation time (T), is the average age of parents giving birth, which in turn is a function of the age-specific schedules of survival and reproduction.
views.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。
views.formula_section: The Genetic Effective Size of a Population: Introduction

introduced_concepts.name: Tau
introduced_concepts.definition: Tau names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Tau 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 3.13 Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 3.13 Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

views.name: Formula 3.14 Relationship
views.definition: The average generation length is the natural time scale for the evolutionary analysis of age-structured populations.
views.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。

views.name: Heterozygosity
views.definition: The probability that two randomly sampled alleles at a locus are different.
views.definition_zh: 杂合度表示随机抽取两个等位基因时二者不同的概率，是衡量遗传多样性的核心量。
views.formula_section: The Genetic Effective Size of a Population: Introduction

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 在路径最终丢失这一条件下定义的函数。
